deposit().notice: Add liquidity proportionally. Mints LP shares to sender.

getLiquidity(address).notice: Returns LP share balance for an address.

init(uint256).notice: Initializes the DEX with initial liquidity. Can only be called once.

price(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Constant product price formula with 0.3% fee.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Remove liquidity. Burns LP shares and returns proportional ETH + tokens.
